modelIdentification.name: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
modelIdentification.purpose: The RPR FOM supports interoperability for real-time, platform oriented defense simulation.
modelIdentification.description: This module provides a common base for RPR based FOM modules. It contains common datatypes and the BaseEntity and EmbeddedSystem object class definitions.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
Standard for Guidance, Rationale, and Interoperability Modalities for the Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model (RPR FOM) SISO-STD-001-2025 4 November 2025
IEEE Standard for Distributed Interactive Simulation - Application Protocols IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 19 December 2012

modelIdentification.other:
Copyright © 2025 by the Simulation Interoperability Standards Organization, Inc. 7901 4th St N, Suite 300-4043 St Petersburg FL 33702 USA
All rights reserved.
Schema and API: SISO hereby grants a general, royalty-free license to copy, distribute, display, and make derivative works from this material, for all purposes, provided that any use of the material contains the following attribution: “Reprinted with permission from SISO Inc.” Should a reader require additional information, contact the SISO Inc. Board of Directors.
Documentation: SISO hereby grants a general, royalty-free license to copy, distribute, display, and make derivative works from this material, for noncommercial purposes, provided that any use of the material contains the following attribution: “Reprinted with permission from SISO Inc.” The material may not be used for a commercial purpose without express written permission from the SISO Inc. Board of Directors.
SISO Inc. Board of Directors 7901 4th St N, Suite 300-4043 St Petersburg FL 33702 USA

objectClass.name: BaseEntity
objectClass.semantics: A base class of aggregate and discrete scenario domain participants. The BaseEntity class is characterized by being located at a particular location in space and independently movable, if capable of movement at all. It specifically excludes elements normally considered to be a component of another element. The BaseEntity class is intended to be a container for common attributes for entities of this type. Since it lacks sufficient class specific attributes that are required for simulation purposes, federates cannot publish objects of this class. Certain simulation management federates, e.g. viewers, may subscribe to this class. Simulation federates will normally subscribe to one of the subclasses, to gain the extra information required to properly simulate the entity.

attribute.name: EntityIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The unique identifier for the entity instance.

attribute.name: IsPartOf
attribute.semantics: Defines if the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted the host entity). If the entity is a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to the EntityIdentifier of the host entity and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the RTI object instance ID of the host entity. If the entity is not a constituent part of another entity then the HostEntityIdentifier shall be set to 0.0.0 and the HostRTIObjectIdentifier shall be set to the empty string.

attribute.name: Spatial
attribute.semantics: Spatial state of the entity's coordinate system with respect to the world coordinate system.

attribute.name: RelativeSpatial
attribute.semantics: Spatial state of the entity's coordinate system with respect to the host entity's coordinate system. References to the host entity are provided in the IsPartOf attribute.

objectClass.name: EmbeddedSystem
objectClass.semantics: A base class used to associate components such as sensor and emitting systems with their parent entity object.

attribute.name: EntityIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The EntityIdentifier of the object which this embedded system is a part of.

attribute.name: HostObjectIdentifier
attribute.semantics: The RTI object instance ID of the object of which this embedded system is part of.

attribute.name: RelativePosition
attribute.semantics: The position of the embedded system, relative to the host object's position.

timeStamp.semantics: Number of microseconds since the Epoch. The default Epoch is 00:00 Jan 1, 1970 in the UTC+0 time zone, but other Epochs may be agreed by a federation. Leap days are included in the calculation, but leap seconds are not.

updateReflectTag.semantics: User-supplied tag provided with each update/reflect of object instance attribute values. Contains (at least) the time at which the provided data is valid.

sendReceiveTag.semantics: User-supplied tag provided with each send/receive of an interaction. Contains (at least) the time at which the provided data is valid.

synchronizationPoint.label: RPRobjectsRegistered
synchronizationPoint.semantics: Indicates that all object instances have been registered.

synchronizationPoint.label: RPRattributesUpdated
synchronizationPoint.semantics: Indicates that all required updates with initial values have been provided for all registered instances.

simpleData.name: AccelerationMeterPerSecondSquaredFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Linear acceleration vector composed of SI base units. Based on the Linear Acceleration Vector record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.96 item b.

simpleData.name: AngleDegreeFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angle, based on unit degree (of arc), unit symbol °.

simpleData.name: AngleRadianFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angle, based on SI derived unit radian, unit symbol rad.

simpleData.name: AngularVelocityRadianPerSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Angular velocity vector composed of SI base units. Based on the Angular Velocity Vector record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.7.

simpleData.name: BitsUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Number of valid data bits.

simpleData.name: BitsUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Number of valid data bits.

simpleData.name: ClockTimeHourInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time past on the clock in full hours since a specified point in time.

simpleData.name: DepthMeterFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Depth, based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: Float32
simpleData.semantics: Single-precision floating point number.

simpleData.name: Float64
simpleData.semantics: Double-precision floating point number.

simpleData.name: FrequencyHertzFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Frequency, based on SI derived unit hertz, unit symbol Hz.

simpleData.name: Integer16
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [-2^15, 2^15-1].

simpleData.name: Integer32
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [-2^31, 2^31-1].

simpleData.name: InterrogationsPerSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Number of interrogations per second.

simpleData.name: LengthMeterFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Length, based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: MassKilogramFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Mass, based on SI base unit kilogram, unit symbol kg.

simpleData.name: MeterFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: MeterFloat64
simpleData.semantics: Datatype based on SI base unit meter, unit symbol m.

simpleData.name: Octet
simpleData.semantics: Uninterpreted 8-bit value.

simpleData.name: PercentFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Percentage

simpleData.name: PercentUnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Percentage

simpleData.name: PowerRatioDecibelMilliwattFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Power ratio in decibels (dB) of a measured power referenced to 1 milliwatt (mW).

simpleData.name: RevolutionsPerMinuteInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Frequency of rotation, expressed in revolutions per minute.

simpleData.name: TemperatureDegreeCelsiusFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Temperature, based on SI derived unit degree Celsius, unit symbol °C.

simpleData.name: TimeMicrosecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, expressed in microsecond, unit symbol μs.

simpleData.name: TimeMillisecondUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, expressed in millisecond, unit symbol ms.

simpleData.name: TimeSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Time in SI base unit second, unit symbol s.

simpleData.name: TimeSecondInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, unit symbol s.

simpleData.name: TimestampUnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: The time past the hour, scaled so that value 0 represents the start of the hour and value 2^31 - 1 represents one time unit before the start of the next hour, thereby resulting in each time unit representing exactly 3600/(2^31) s, which is approximately 1.67638063 microsecond.

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^16-1].

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger32
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^32-1].

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger64
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^64-1].

simpleData.name: UnsignedInteger8
simpleData.semantics: Integer in the range [0, 2^8-1].

simpleData.name: VelocityMeterPerSecondFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Speed/Velocity in meter per second.

simpleData.name: WavelengthMicronFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Wavelength expressed in micrometer.

arrayData.name: ClockTimeStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Dynamic array of ClockTimeStruct elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: EntityTypeStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Dynamic array of EntityTypeStruct elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: Float32Array1Plus
arrayData.semantics: Generic dynamic array of Float32 elements, containing at least one element.

arrayData.name: LocationStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Dynamic array of LocationStruct elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: OctetArray
arrayData.semantics: Generic dynamic array of Octet elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: OctetArray1Plus
arrayData.semantics: Generic dynamic array of Octet elements, containing at least one element.

arrayData.name: OctetArray3
arrayData.semantics: Generic array of three Octet elements.

arrayData.name: OctetArray7
arrayData.semantics: Generic array of seven Octet elements.

arrayData.name: OpaqueDatum32
arrayData.semantics: Structure to hold an opaque datum of up to 32 bits. The datum bits are followed by padding bits to align to a 32-bit boundary.

arrayData.name: OpaqueDatum64
arrayData.semantics: Structure to hold an opaque datum, or part thereof, of up to 64 bits. For larger datums, the datatype OpaqueDatum64Array1Plus may be used. The datum bits are followed by padding bits to align to a 64-bit boundary.

arrayData.name: OpaqueDatum64Array1Plus
arrayData.semantics: Structure to hold an opaque datum of any number of bits, padded to a 64-bit boundary.

arrayData.name: OrientationStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Dynamic array of OrientationStruct elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: UnsignedInteger16Array1Plus
arrayData.semantics: Generic dynamic array of UnsignedInteger16 elements, containing at least one element.

arrayData.name: UnsignedInteger32Array
arrayData.semantics: Generic dynamic array of UnsignedInteger32 elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: UnsignedInteger8Array
arrayData.semantics: Generic dynamic array of UnsignedInteger8 elements, may also contain no elements.

arrayData.name: VariableParameterVariantStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Dynamic array of VariableParameterVariantStruct elements, may also contain no elements.

fixedRecordData.name: AccelerationVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity over time.

field.name: XAcceleration
field.semantics: Acceleration component along the X axis.

field.name: YAcceleration
field.semantics: Acceleration component along the Y axis.

field.name: ZAcceleration
field.semantics: Acceleration component along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: AngularVelocityVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The rate at which the orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

field.name: XAngularVelocity
field.semantics: Acceleration component about the X axis.

field.name: YAngularVelocity
field.semantics: Acceleration component about the Y axis.

field.name: ZAngularVelocity
field.semantics: Acceleration component about the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: ArticulatedPartVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify a movable part or a combination of a moveable/attached part of an entity. Based on the Articulated Part VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.2.

field.name: ChangeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicator of a change to the part. This field shall be set to zero for each exercise and sequentially incremented by one for each change in articulation parameters. In the case where all possible values are exhausted, the numbers shall be reused beginning at zero.

field.name: PartAttachedTo
field.semantics: Identification of the articulated part to which this articulation parameter is attached. This field shall contain the value zero if the articulated part is attached directly to the entity.

field.name: ParameterTypeClass
field.semantics: The type class uniquely identifies a particular articulated part on a given entity type. Guidance for uniquely assigning type classes to an entity's articulated parts is given in Section 4.8 of the enumeration document (SISO-REF-010).

field.name: ParameterTypeMetric
field.semantics: The type metric uniquely identifies the transformation to be applied to the articulated part.

field.name: Value
field.semantics: Value of the transformation to be applied to the articulated part.

fixedRecordData.name: AttachedPartVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify a removable part that may be attached to an entity. Based on the Attached Part VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.3.

field.name: DetachedIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether an attached part is attached or detached.

field.name: PartAttachedTo
field.semantics: Identification of the articulated or attached part to which this attached part is attached. This field shall contain the value zero if the attached part is attached directly to the entity.

field.name: ParameterType
field.semantics: Identification of the location (or station) to which the part is attached.

field.name: AttachedPartType
field.semantics: The entity type of the attached part.

fixedRecordData.name: BeamAntennaStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies the direction, pattern, and polarization of radiation from a radio transmitter's antenna.

field.name: BeamOrientation
field.semantics: The rotation that transforms the reference coordinate system into the beam coordinate system.

field.name: BeamAzimuthBeamwidth
field.semantics: The full width of the beam to the -3 dB power density points in the x-y plane of the beam coordinate system.

field.name: BeamElevationBeamwidth
field.semantics: The full width of the beam to the -3 dB power density points in the x-z plane of the beam coordinate system.

field.name: ReferenceSystem
field.semantics: The reference coordinate system with respect to which beam direction is specified.

field.name: Ez
field.semantics: The magnitude of the Z-component (in beam coordinates) of the Electrical field at some arbitrary single point in the main beam and in the far field of the antenna.

field.name: Ex
field.semantics: The magnitude of the X-component (in beam coordinates) of the Electrical field at some arbitrary single point in the main beam and in the far field of the antenna.

field.name: BeamPhaseAngle
field.semantics: The phase angle between Ez and Ex in radians.

fixedRecordData.name: ClockTimeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of the point in time of an occurrence. Based on the Clock Time record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.14.

field.name: Hours
field.semantics: The number of hours since 0000 hours, January 1, 1970 UTC.

field.name: TimePastTheHour
field.semantics: The time past the hour indicated in the Hours field.

fixedRecordData.name: ConstituentPartRelationshipStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The relationship of the constituent part object to its host object. Based on the Relationship record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.74.

field.name: Nature
field.semantics: The nature or purpose for the joining of the constituent part object to the host object.

field.name: Position
field.semantics: The position of the constituent part object with respect to the host object.

fixedRecordData.name: DimensionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Bounding box in X,Y,Z axis.

field.name: XAxisLength
field.semantics: Length in meters along X axis.

field.name: YAxisLength
field.semantics: Length in meters along Y axis.

field.name: ZAxisLength
field.semantics: Length in meters along Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityAssociationVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify an association or disassociation of two entities, or an entity with another object. Based on the Entity Association VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.4.

field.name: ChangeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the (dis)association changed since the last issuance.

field.name: AssociationStatus
field.semantics: The association status between two entities, or an entity with another object.

field.name: AssociationType
field.semantics: The type of association that exists between two entities, or an entity with another object.

field.name: ObjectID
field.semantics: The object ID of the entity or other object associated with this entity.

field.name: OwnStationLocation
field.semantics: The station location on one's own entity where a physical connection is attached, if known.

field.name: PhysicalConnectionType
field.semantics: The type of physical connection, if any, between this entity and another entity or object.

field.name: GroupMemberType
field.semantics: The type of member the entity is within the group.

field.name: GroupNumber
field.semantics: The group, if any, to which an entity belongs.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Unique, exercise-wide identification of the entity, or a symbolic group address referencing multiple entities or a simulation application. Based on the Entity Identifier record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.28. Also refer to IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 4.2.5.2 for general requirements for all object identifiers.

field.name: FederateIdentifier
field.semantics: Simulation application (federate) identifier.

field.name: EntityNumber
field.semantics: The reference number of the entity identifier.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityTypeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Type of entity. Based on the Entity Type and Aggregate Type record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Sections 6.2.30 and 6.2.5, respectively.

field.name: EntityKind
field.semantics: Kind of entity.

field.name: Domain
field.semantics: Domain in which the entity operates.

field.name: CountryCode
field.semantics: Country to which the design of the entity is attributed.

field.name: Category
field.semantics: Main category that describes the entity.

field.name: Subcategory
field.semantics: Subcategory to which an entity belongs based on the Category field.

field.name: Specific
field.semantics: Specific information about an entity based on the Subcategory field.

field.name: Extra
field.semantics: Extra information required to describe a particular entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EntityTypeVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify the Entity Type for an entity when it is different than the entity type value contained in the EntityType attribute. Based on the Entity Type VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.5.

field.name: ChangeIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the Entity Type changed since the last issuance.

field.name: EntityType
field.semantics: Entity Type associated with an entity.

fixedRecordData.name: EventIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Identification of an event. Based on the Event Identifier record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.33.

field.name: EventCount
field.semantics: The event number. Uniquely assigned by the simulation application (federate) that initiates the sequence of events. It shall be set to one for each exercise and incremented by one for each event. In the case where all possible values are exhausted, the numbers may be reused beginning again at one.

field.name: IssuingObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: Identification of the object issuing the event.

fixedRecordData.name: FederateIdentifierStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Unique identification of the simulation application (federate) in an exercise, or a symbolic group address referencing multiple simulation applications. Based on the Simulation Address record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.80.

field.name: SiteID
field.semantics: Each site participating in an event (e.g., training exercise, experiment, and test) shall be assigned a unique SiteID that is different from any other site that is part of the same event. The range of valid SiteID values that may be assigned to a specific site is from 1 to 65 534. The manner in which SiteID values are assigned is part of federation agreements. A SiteID value of NO_SITE (fixed value: 0) indicates no specific site. A SiteID value of ALL_SITES (fixed value: FFFF (H)) indicates all sites.

field.name: ApplicationID
field.semantics: Each application (federate) participating in an event (e.g., training exercise) shall be assigned a unique ApplicationID value for the site with which the application is associated. An application may be assigned multiple ApplicationID values, see IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 4.2.3.3. The range of valid ApplicationID values that may be assigned to a specific application is from 1 to 65 534. The manner in which ApplicationID values are assigned is part of federation agreements. An ApplicationID value of NO_APPLIC (fixed value: 0) indicates no specific application. An ApplicationID value of ALL_APPLIC (fixed value: FFFF (H)) indicates all applications.

fixedRecordData.name: IsPartOfStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Defines the spatial relationship between two objects.

field.name: HostEntityIdentifier
field.semantics: The identifier of the entity of which the object is a constituent part.

field.name: HostRTIObjectIdentifier
field.semantics: The RTI instance identifier of the object of which this object is a constituent part.

field.name: Relationship
field.semantics: The relationship of the constituent part object to its host object.

field.name: NamedLocation
field.semantics: The discrete positional relationship of the constituent part object with respect to its host object.

fixedRecordData.name: LinearSegmentStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specifies linear object segment characteristics.

field.name: SegmentNumber
field.semantics: Identifies the individual segment.

field.name: PercentComplete
field.semantics: Specifies the percent completion of the segment.

field.name: IsLocationModified
field.semantics: Whether the location of the linear segment has been modified since the last update.

field.name: IsOrientationModified
field.semantics: Whether the orientation of the linear segment has been modified since the last update.

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Specifies the location of the segment in the world coordinate system.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: Specifies the orientation of the segment.

field.name: Length
field.semantics: Specifies the length of the segment, in meters, extending in the positive X direction.

field.name: Width
field.semantics: Specifies the total width of the segment, in meters; one-half of the width shall extend in the positive Y direction, and one-half of the width shall extend in the negative Y direction.

field.name: Height
field.semantics: Specifies the height of the segment, in meters, above ground.

field.name: Depth
field.semantics: Specifies the depth of the segment, in meters, below ground level.

field.name: Damage
field.semantics: Specifies the damaged appearance of the segment.

field.name: State
field.semantics: Specifies whether or not the segment has been deactivated (it has ceased to exist in the synthetic environment).

field.name: IsFlaming
field.semantics: Specifies whether the segment is burning and flames are visible.

field.name: Predistributed
field.semantics: Specifies whether or not the segment was created before the start of the exercise.

field.name: IsSmoking
field.semantics: Specifies whether or not the segment is smoking (creating a smoke plume).

field.name: IEDPresent
field.semantics: Specifies whether the segment has or contains an IED.

fixedRecordData.name: LocalEulerAnglesStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The orientation of an object in the local coordinate system, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section E.8.2.2.

field.name: LocalYaw
field.semantics: Heading from true North, positive to the right, in radians.

field.name: LocalPitch
field.semantics: Elevation angle above or below the local horizon, positive up, in radians. Limited to between -pi/2 and +pi/2, inclusive.

field.name: LocalRoll
field.semantics: Bank angle from the local horizontal, positive tilt to the right (also called right wing down), in radians.

fixedRecordData.name: LocationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The location of a point in space. Unless specified otherwise for the attribute, parameter, or datatype field using this datatype, the location is in the world coordinate system, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 1.6.3.

field.name: X
field.semantics: Distance from the origin along the X axis.

field.name: Y
field.semantics: Distance from the origin along the Y axis.

field.name: Z
field.semantics: Distance from the origin along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: NamedLocationIdentificationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify the discrete positional relationship of the part entity with respect to its host entity. Based on the Named Location Identification record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.62.

field.name: StationName
field.semantics: The station name within the host at which the part entity is located.

field.name: StationNumber
field.semantics: The number of the particular wing station, cargo hold, and so on, at which the part is attached.

fixedRecordData.name: NamedLocationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The discrete positional relationship of the constituent part object with respect to its host object. Based on the specifications in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 of the IsPartOf PDU Part Location (Section 7.8.5 item e) and Named Location ID (Section 7.8.5 item f) fields.

field.name: StationNumber
field.semantics: The number of the particular station at which the constituent part is attached.

field.name: StationName
field.semantics: The name of the station where the constituent part is located.

fixedRecordData.name: OrientationStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The orientation of an object in space. Unless specified otherwise for the attribute, parameter, or datatype field using this datatype, the orientation is in the world coordinate system, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 1.6.3

field.name: Psi
field.semantics: Rotation about the Z axis.

field.name: Theta
field.semantics: Rotation about the Y axis.

field.name: Phi
field.semantics: Rotation about the X axis.

fixedRecordData.name: RelativePositionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Relative position in right-handed Cartesian coordinates.

field.name: BodyXDistance
field.semantics: The distance from the reference location along the X axis.

field.name: BodyYDistance
field.semantics: The distance from the reference location along the Y axis.

field.name: BodyZDistance
field.semantics: The distance from the reference location along the Z axis.

fixedRecordData.name: RelativeRangeBearingStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Relative position in polar coordinates.

field.name: Range
field.semantics: The range from the reference location.

field.name: Bearing
field.semantics: The bearing from the reference location.

fixedRecordData.name: RPRUserDefinedTag
fixedRecordData.semantics: This User Defined Tag enables federations to exchange timestamps for updates and interactions for real-time execution. Federations that wish to exchange additional information in the User Defined Tag may create a custom version of this fixed record that contains additional fields at the end.

field.name: Timestamp
field.semantics: Time for which the update or interaction is valid. See the Time Representation table for semantics.

field.name: IsAbsoluteTime
field.semantics: Set to true to indicate if the timestamp is Absolute time, i.e. synchronized with the reference time.

fixedRecordData.name: ScaledWorldOrientationQuaternionStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The orientation of an object in the world coordinate system, described by a quaternion, as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section E.8.2.3.

field.name: Scaled0
field.semantics: Scalar component of the quaternion, scaled to a 16-bit unsigned integer.

field.name: X
field.semantics: X component of the quaternion.

field.name: Y
field.semantics: Y component of the quaternion.

field.name: Z
field.semantics: Z component of the quaternion.

fixedRecordData.name: SeparationVPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Structure to specify the physical separation of an entity from another entity. Based on the Separation VP record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.6.

field.name: SeparationReason
field.semantics: The reason for the separation.

field.name: PreEntityIndicator
field.semantics: Indicates whether the entity existed prior to the separation and, if so, in what manner.

field.name: ParentObjectID
field.semantics: The object ID of the parent entity/object.

field.name: StationLocation
field.semantics: The station that this entity was attached to prior to separation if known.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialFPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm FPW (2) and FPB (6).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialFVStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm FVW (5) and FVB (9).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AccelerationVector
field.semantics: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity of an object over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialRPStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm RPW (3) and RPB (7).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AngularVelocity
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialRVStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm RVW (4) and RVB (8).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: VelocityVector
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's position is changing over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AccelerationVector
field.semantics: The magnitude of the change in linear velocity of an object over time, in reference or own body coordinates depending on the Dead Reckoning Algorithm.

field.name: AngularVelocity
field.semantics: The rate at which an object's orientation is changing over time, in body coordinates.

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: SpatialStaticStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Spatial structure for Dead Reckoning Algorithm Static (1).

field.name: Location
field.semantics: Location of the object, in reference system coordinates.

field.name: IsFrozen
field.semantics: Whether the object is frozen or not.

field.name: Orientation
field.semantics: The angles of rotation around the coordinate axes between the object's attitude and the reference coordinate system axes (calculated as the Tait-Bryan Euler angles specifying the successive rotations needed to transform from the reference coordinate system to the entity coordinate system).

field.name: OtherParameters
field.semantics: Optional additional parameters required for more complex dead reckoning algorithms.

fixedRecordData.name: VariableDatumStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: These fields shall specify the types of variable datum, their length, and their value.

field.name: DatumID
field.semantics: The fixed datum id represented by a 32-bit enumeration.

field.name: DatumLength
field.semantics: This field shall specify the length of the variable datum in bits.

field.name: DatumValue
field.semantics: The value of the variable datum. The field format depends on the type of datum as specified by the DatumID. If necessary, this field includes padding to a 64-bit boundary.

fixedRecordData.name: VelocityVectorStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: The rate at which the position is changing over time.

field.name: XVelocity
field.semantics: Velocity component along the X axis.

field.name: YVelocity
field.semantics: Velocity component along the Y axis.

field.name: ZVelocity
field.semantics: Velocity component along the Z axis.

variantRecordData.name: DeadReckoningParametersVariantStruct

alternative.name: None
alternative.semantics: No additional dead reckoning parameter data. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section E.8.2.1.

alternative.name: LocalEulerAngles
alternative.semantics: Alternative for local coordinate Yaw-Pitch-Roll Euler angles.

variantRecordData.semantics: Variant record for additional dead reckoning parameters.

variantRecordData.name: MinefieldSensorTypeVariantStruct
variantRecordData.semantics: Information about a particular mine sensor. Based on the Minefield Sensor Type record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.57.

variantRecordData.name: SpatialVariantStruct

alternative.name: SpatialStatic
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing a static object.

alternative.name: SpatialFPW
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with a constant velocity (or low acceleration) linear motion. With the linear velocity provided in reference system coordinates (world or host entity's coordinate system).

alternative.name: SpatialRPW
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with a constant velocity (or low acceleration) linear motion, including rotation information. With the linear velocity provided in reference system coordinates (world or host entity's coordinate system).

alternative.name: SpatialRVW
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with high speed or maneuvering at any speed, including rotation information. With the linear velocity and acceleration provided in reference system coordinates (world or host entity's coordinate system).

alternative.name: SpatialFVW
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with high speed or maneuvering at any speed. With the linear velocity and acceleration provided in reference system coordinates (world or host entity's coordinate system).

alternative.name: SpatialFPB
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with a constant velocity (or low acceleration) linear motion. With the linear velocity provided in own body axis coordinates.

alternative.name: SpatialRPB
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with a constant velocity (or low acceleration) linear motion, including rotation information. With the linear velocity provided in own body axis coordinates.

alternative.name: SpatialRVB
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with high speed or maneuvering at any speed, including rotation information. With the linear velocity and acceleration provided in own body axis coordinates.

alternative.name: SpatialFVB
alternative.semantics: Variant for representing an object with high speed or maneuvering at any speed. With the linear velocity and acceleration provided in own body axis coordinates.

variantRecordData.semantics: Variant Record for a single spatial attribute.

variantRecordData.name: StationNameLocationVariantStruct

alternative.name: RelativeLocation
alternative.semantics: The location of the constituent part object relative to the host object entity coordinate system.

alternative.name: RelativeRangeAndBearing
alternative.semantics: The location of the constituent part object relative to the host object in polar coordinates.

variantRecordData.semantics: The station name at which the constituent part is located. In case of 'On Station', the alternative specifies its location relative to the host object.

variantRecordData.name: VariableParameterVariantStruct
variantRecordData.semantics:
Variant record specifying information on articulated parts, attached parts, and other data associated with an entity or detonation. Based on the Variable Parameter record as specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.94.
Note that usage of this datatype for the PhysicalEntity object class and MunitionDetonation interaction class attribute/parameter VariableParametersArray shall be in accordance with IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Annex I.

note.label: RPRnoteBase1
note.semantics: Federates shall send the time at which the data is valid in the user-supplied tag with every attribute values update and interaction; see datatype RPRUserDefinedTag for the encoding. All federates shall transmit this field, even if they do not use it themselves, so that other federates can use its value to compensate for network transport delays.

note.label: RPRnoteBase4
note.semantics: If the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted by the IsPartOf attribute being set appropriately) then the Spatial attribute may be ignored by a receiving federate. Instead, the receiving federate can calculate spatial attribute values by adding the offsets provided in the RelativeSpatial attribute to the values provided in the host entity's Spatial attribute. Even if a federate is updating RelativeSpatial, it should still update Spatial for the benefit of federates who do not subscribe to the optional RelativeSpatial and IsPartOf attributes.

note.label: RPRnoteBase5
note.semantics: The update condition shall be evaluated as follows: The owner of a base entity object shall maintain two state models of the object in support of the dead reckoning process. One model shall be the internal model used by the simulation application to represent that object. The other shall be a dead reckoning model of the object. Certain thresholds shall be established as criteria for determining if the object's actual TSPI data has varied by an allowable amount from the dead reckoned TSPI data. The update condition is TRUE when either: a) the object's actual position differs from the dead reckoned position by more than DRA_POS_THRSH (default value: 1 m), or b) the object's actual orientation differs from the dead reckoned orientation by more than DRA_ORIENT_THRSH (default value: 3 degree). See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Sections 4.6.6 and 5.3.2.3 and Annex E for more details on dead reckoning.

note.label: RPRnoteBase6
note.semantics: This must reference a valid Object instance.

note.label: RPRnoteBase7
note.semantics: The units of the Value field depends on the value of the ParameterTypeMetric field. The units are defined in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section I.2.2.5.

note.label: RPRnoteBase8
note.semantics: All fields in the entity type struct are enumerations. The values for the individual fields are to be derived from the federation agreements, which could refer to SISO-REF-010. The values used in this structure should comply with the requirements specified in IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.30 (for platform and environmental entities) and Section 6.2.5 (for aggregate entities).

note.label: RPRnoteBase9
note.semantics: Frozen entities should not be dead-reckoned, i.e. should be displayed as fixed at the current location even if non-zero velocity, acceleration or rotation data received from the frozen entity.

note.label: RPRnoteBase10
note.semantics: If the entity is a constituent part of another entity (denoted by the IsPartOf attribute being set appropriately) then the IsFrozen attribute is no longer updated. The frozen status of the entity is the same as the frozen status of the host entity.

note.label: RPRnoteBase11
note.semantics: The DatumLength equals the length in bits of the DatumValue only. The total size of a VariableDatumStruct record must account for the padding length.

note.label: RPRnoteBase12
note.semantics: The type of the DatumValue field is determined by the value of the DatumID field. The types and associated units, etc., for each of the DatumID enumeration values are to be derived from the federation agreements, which could refer to SISO-REF-010. The DatumValue element type is defined as a UnsignedInteger64 (64 bits) to ensure the correct byte alignment for types that include 64-bit elements.

note.label: RPRnoteBase13
note.semantics: This note applies when this datatype is used within the BaseEntity.IsPartOf attribute. The following StationName enumerations - On station RNG/BRG (15) and On station - x,y,z (16), are optional to transmit along with associated RelativeLocation or RelativeRangeAndBearing information. If these enumeration values (15) and (16) are received, they shall be ignored. The RelativeSpatial attribute shall be used in all cases. (Note: The RelativeLocation field uses the same Location contained in the RelativeSpatial attribute. In both these cases, the values represent the relative location of a part entity to the host entity in the referenced entity coordinate system. The RelativeRangeAndBearing field does not provide full relative spatial data and, therefore, cannot be substituted for the RelativeSpatial attribute.)
